title: Tamil Pepper Rasam
description: Manual CSV upload row for Tamil rasam
ingredients: 2 cups water | 1 tomato | 1 tsp pepper | 1 tsp cumin | 1 tbsp tamarind | 1 pinch salt
instructions: Crush pepper and cumin coarsely | Simmer tomato with tamarind water and salt | Add the spice powder and boil briefly | Temper with mustard seeds if desired | Serve hot with rice

title: Assamese Aloo Pitika
description: Manual CSV upload row for Assamese mash
ingredients: 3 potatoes | 1 onion | 2 green chillies | 1 tbsp mustard oil | 1 pinch salt
instructions: Boil potatoes until soft | Peel and mash the potatoes while warm | Mix onion green chillies salt and mustard oil | Shape into a soft mash | Serve with rice and dal
